title: Alternate formats for information about the 2023 Disability Survey | Stats NZ
content:
## Alternate formats for information about the 2023 Disability Survey
The information on this page has been developed to support people who have been chosen to take part in the 2023 Disability Survey.
The collection period for the 2023 Disability Survey closed on 26 November 2023.
For more information or if you have any questions about the 2023 Disability Survey, please:
- email survey@stats.govt.nz .
Alternate formats are available to help you access information about the survey in a way that best meet your needs. Formats available to download on this page include Audio, Braille, Easy Read, Large Print, and New Zealand Sign Language (NZSL).
To order a hard copy of Braille, Easy Read and Large Print, please fill out the form below. If you need assistance filling out the form, or if there is something you need that is not listed below, please:
- email disability@stats.govt.nz .

## What you will find on this page
Audio Braille Easy Read Large Print New Zealand Sign Language (NZSL) Form for ordering hard copies of the alternate formats
- Audio copy of the selection letter from Stats NZ about the 2023 Disability Survey MP3 audio file, 2.1 MB
